Control Objective: Reduce unauthorized administrative access by enforcing MFA on privileged accounts
Notes: Apply to cloud console and repository admins

Control Objective: Prevent plaintext secrets in code and logs through centralized key/secret handling
Notes: Include rotation and access review procedures

Control Objective: Improve detection speed by aggregating critical logs and tuning alerts
Notes: Cover auth systems cloud APIs and repository events

Control Objective: Ensure incidents are classified contained and communicated consistently
Notes: Align with severity criteria and reporting obligations

Control Objective: Restore services in trusted state based on business priority and tested backups
Notes: Track recovery test outcomes and lessons learned
